name: chr3_3q29_microdeletion_BPs
description: 3q29 recurrent microdeletion/microduplication breakpoints. Two flanking ~17-24 kb low-copy repeats in direct orientation drive the ~1.6 Mb NAHR event; deletion confers strong schizophrenia and intellectual-disability risk and includes DLG1, BDH1, PAK2.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking LCRs of ~17-24 kb at ~98% identity in direct orientation; intervening unique segment of ~1.6 Mb contains DLG1, BDH1, PAK2, TFRC, PCYT1A.
